evals.name: Simple GNM: Retail Deposits (B)
evals.prompt: Tạo GNM cho Retail Deposits ở Level B, với 3 sản phẩm: Savings Account, Current Account, CASA. Feature duy nhất là Account Management.
evals.expected: Format A, f=1, n=3, L2=0, Zone 3: 3/3 cells filled, V-gate PASS

evals.name: Complex Multi-Feature: WB Lending (B)
evals.prompt: Tạo GNM cho Wholesale Banking Lending ở Level B, 3 sản phẩm (Working Capital, Medium-Long Term, LC/UPAS) và 3 Features (Origination, Risk Management, Portfolio Monitoring).
evals.expected: Format A, f=3, n=3, Zone 3: 9/9 cells, Feature flow: Origination→Risk→Monitoring, V-gate PASS

evals.name: VIB Domain: Corporate Banking (B)
evals.prompt: Tạo GNM cho Corporate Banking Services ở Level B, với 4 sản phẩm: Transaction Banking, Lending, Investment Services, Liquidity Management. Features: Client Onboarding, Product Delivery, Risk Compliance. Sử dụng đúng thuật ngữ VIB.
evals.expected: Format A, f=3, n=4, Zone 3: 12/12, VIB terminology, domain_context=vib, V-gate PASS

evals.name: Level A Overview: Retail Banking (A)
evals.prompt: Tạo GNM Level A cho Retail Banking Division với 3 Units: Consumer Lending, Deposits & Payments, Wealth Management. Feature: Divisional Strategies. Zone 3 chứa engines tham chiếu sub-GNMs Level B.
evals.expected: Format A, f=1, n=3, Zone 3: ALL engines (no values at Level A), HYPERLINK refs to B-level sheets

evals.name: Level Z Detail: Mortgage Pricing (Z)
evals.prompt: Tạo GNM Level Z cho Mortgage Pricing, 4 sản phẩm (Fixed 1Y, Fixed 3Y, Fixed 5Y, Variable), 2 features (Rate Calculation, Margin Setting). Zone 3 chứa values định lượng: spread, floor rate, NIM target.
evals.expected: Format A, f=2, n=4, Zone 3: ALL quantitative values with [^n]/[EST] tags, V-gate PASS

evals.name: REVIEW — High-Quality GNM (no errors)
evals.prompt: Review the GNM Excel: WB Lending (B) — correct structure, all Zone 3 filled, proper formulas.
evals.expected: Format B, V-gate PASS, Quality ≥8.0, 0-2 minor observations only

evals.name: REVIEW — Defective GNM (4 planted errors)
evals.prompt: Review GNM with errors: (1) 2 empty Zone 3 cells, (2) E5 static mismatch with B5, (3) missing Zone 4 consolidation, (4) incoherent feature in Zone 2.
evals.expected: Format B, V-gate FAIL, ≥3/4 errors detected, severity HIGH→MED→LOW, rule citations

evals.name: REVIEW — Domain Terminology Errors
evals.prompt: Review GNM for Retail Banking using generic labels ('Consumer Product 1') instead of VIB terms ('Savings Account').
evals.expected: V-gate PASS (structure valid), domain_accuracy ≤6/10, terminology issues flagged

evals.name: MODIFY — Add Feature to GNM
evals.prompt: Add Feature 'Portfolio Monitoring' to WB Lending (B) currently with 2 features (Origination, Risk Management).
evals.expected: Impact analysis, column shift G-H→G-I, Conso shift, 3 new Zone 3 cells, B2 merge extended

evals.name: MODIFY — Delete Item from GNM
evals.prompt: Remove 'Cards' from Retail Banking (B) with 4 items. Cards detail moved to separate Z-level GNM.
evals.expected: Row deletion, Zone 3 shrinks 4×2→3×2, All/Common rows shift up, merge ranges updated

evals.name: MODIFY — Replace Feature (semantic change)
evals.prompt: Replace 'Risk Management' with 'Pricing & Margin Management' in Corporate Lending (B).
evals.expected: All engines in modified column reframed semantically, feature flow reassessed

evals.name: CASCADE — 3-Sheet A→B→Z
evals.prompt: Create cascade: RBL(A) overview → MTG(B) mortgage detail → MTP(Z) mortgage pricing. With HYPERLINKs and backlinks.
evals.expected: 3 sheets, per-sheet V-gate PASS, forward+back HYPERLINKs, 5-phase write order cross-sheet

evals.name: CASCADE REVIEW — Validate 4-Sheet Cascade
evals.prompt: Validate existing 4-sheet cascade: RBB(A) → RBL(B) and WBB(B) → MTP(Z). Check DAG topology, per-sheet V-gate, hyperlinks.
evals.expected: Format B with DAG diagram, per-sheet V-gate status, aggregate quality scorecard

evals.name: GENERATE — Build Spec to Excel
evals.prompt: Generate Excel from Build Spec JSON: RBL(B), f=2, L2=0, n=3 (Mortgage, Auto, Personal), features (Origination, Monitoring).
evals.expected: .xlsx file, correct zone placement, E5=B5 formula, B2:I2 merge, canonical styling, V-gate PASS

evals.name: EXPLAIN — Zone 3 Value Matrix Logic
evals.prompt: Giải thích Zone 3 trong GNM hoạt động thế nào? Tại sao phải đảm bảo không có ô trống? Dùng ví dụ Retail Banking.
evals.expected: Format D, WHAT×TODO intersection explained, MFM philosophy connected, concrete example, visual diagram

evals.name: CONVERT — Strategy Doc to GNM
evals.prompt: Convert this retail lending strategy document into a GNM Level B: Focus areas are Mortgage Growth, Auto Lending Expansion, Personal Loan Digitization. Each area has Origination and Monitoring functions.
evals.expected: Format A, f=2, n=3, Zone 1 from strategy themes, Zone 2 from functions, V-gate PASS

evals.name: CONVERT — Level A to Level B Expansion
evals.prompt: Convert RBL(A) overview GNM to RBL(B) detail. A-level has 3 items with engine refs. Expand engines to values.
evals.expected: Zone 3 engines replaced with quantitative values, cascade ref maintained, Level field B

evals.name: DELETE — Remove Single Item
evals.prompt: Delete 'Cards' from Retail Banking (B) GNM with 4 items. Cards detail moved to separate Z-level.
evals.expected: Row removed, n=4->3, formulas updated, All/Common rows shifted, Zone 3 shrinks

evals.name: DELETE — Archive Sheet in Cascade
evals.prompt: Archive POM(B) sheet from RCP cascade. Parent RCP(A) has HYPERLINK to POM(B).
evals.expected: [ARCHIVE] prefix added, parent hyperlink removed/updated, backlink removed

evals.name: EXPORT — GNM to JSON
evals.prompt: Export RBL(B) GNM to JSON schema for version control.
evals.expected: Format E, $schema:gnm-v1, zone1/zone2/zone3 keys, bidirectional fidelity

evals.name: EXPORT — Build Spec JSON from GNM
evals.prompt: Generate Build Spec JSON from existing WBL(B) GNM for script-based regeneration.
evals.expected: Build Spec with layout params matching source, zone3 content preserved, gnm metadata

evals.name: PREVIEW — ASCII GNM Layout
evals.prompt: Preview GNM structure for Corporate Banking (B) with 3 items, 2 features before generating.
evals.expected: Format F, ASCII table with column/row layout, zone map footer, V-gate line, Quality score

evals.name: DIFF — Compare GNM Versions
evals.prompt: Compare WBL(B) January version (3 items, 2 features) with March version (4 items, 2 features).
evals.expected: Format G, [NEW]/[RETIRE]/[GAP]/[OK] tags, structural delta, quality delta

evals.name: DIFF — Temporal Pair Comparison
evals.prompt: Compare As-Is vs To-Be for Digital Banking transformation GNM.
evals.expected: [AS-IS]/[TO-BE] naming, gap analysis with [GAP]/[OK]/[NEW]/[RETIRE], Zone 1 structural identity

evals.name: TRAIN — Module 1 Quiz
evals.prompt: Start GNM training Mode Module 1.
evals.expected: Socratic dialogue, concept explanation, exercise prompt, feedback signals, progress tracking
